prompt: Using the provided reference image, transform the anime/manga illustration into a hyper-realistic cinematic photograph while preserving the original composition, pose, camera angle, framing, lighting direction, color palette, all visible text, and every visual element without changing their placement. Replace the stylized rendering with real-world materials and textures: scratched and worn reflective gunmetal, brushed silver metal, glossy black armor, realistic leather-like gloves, physically accurate glowing eye light, true muzzle-flash illumination, flying brass bullet casings, chain links, studs, dents, dust, surface grime, and soft realistic shadows. Keep the large red typography and quotation marks exactly where they are, but render them as crisp printed graphic elements behind the subject. Maintain the same close-up action shot and black border; do not add or remove objects, symbols, text, or background elements.
